widgets_values:
📹 VIDEO UPSCALE WORKFLOW
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 PURPOSE: Upscale any video to 2x resolution using FlashVSR AI

📋 INSTRUCTIONS:

1️⃣ UPLOAD VIDEO:
   • Click 'Load Video' node → Choose video file
   • Supports: MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM
   • Max recommended: 30 seconds for 24GB VRAM

2️⃣ CONFIGURE UPSCALE SETTINGS (Node: FlashVSR Upscaler):
   • Scale: 2 = 2x resolution (480p→960p, 720p→1440p)
   • Mode: 'tiny-long' for videos >10s, 'tiny-short' for <10s
   • Tiled DIT: true (recommended for long videos)
   • Tiled VAE: false (enable if VRAM exceeded)

3️⃣ OUTPUT SETTINGS (Node: Video Output):
   • CRF: 18 (lower = better quality, larger file)
   • Frame Rate: 24 fps (change if your video uses different FPS)
   • Filename: Change prefix if needed

4️⃣ QUEUE PROMPT → Wait → Download result!

💾 VRAM GUIDE (24GB):
   • 480p→960p:  ~8-10GB  ✅ Safe
   • 720p→1440p: ~12-16GB ✅ OK
   • 1080p→4K:   ~18-22GB ⚠️ Use tiled VAE

⏱️ PROCESSING TIME: ~2-3 min per 10 seconds of video

⚙️ UPSCALE SETTINGS GUIDE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎚️ QUALITY PRESETS:

🟢 FAST (Tiled: OFF): Short clips <10s, 480p-720p
   VRAM: ~8-12GB | Speed: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

🟡 BALANCED (Tiled DIT: ON): 10-30s clips ← RECOMMENDED
   VRAM: ~10-16GB | Speed: ⭐⭐⭐⭐

🔴 SAFE (All Tiled: ON): Long videos, 1080p+
   VRAM: ~12-18GB | Speed: ⭐⭐⭐

🎛️ PARAMETER EXPLANATION:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Mode:
  'tiny-short': < 10 seconds
  'tiny-long': > 10 seconds ✅

• Scale: 2 (doubles resolution)
  480x832 → 960x1664
  720p → 1440p
  1080p → 4K

• Tiled VAE: false (use if VRAM error)
• Tiled DIT: true (smoother)
• Seed: 608

💾 OUTPUT SETTINGS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• CRF (Quality):
  18: High quality (large file) ✅
  21: Balanced
  23: Good (smaller file)
  Lower = Better

• Frame Rate:
  24 fps (default) ✅
  30 fps (for 30fps videos)
  60 fps (for 60fps videos)
  ⚠️ Must match source video FPS!

• Format: H.264 MP4
• Filename: Change 'upscaled' prefix

✅ Output: ComfyUI/output/ folder
